task_completion.description: The User Tour named 'New Student Dashboard Guide' is created and enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Moodle User Tours administration page, 'New Student Dashboard Guide' is visible in the list of tours, and its status indicates it is enabled (e.g., the eye icon is open/active).

task_completion.description: The tour is configured to apply to the URL path '/my/%'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The tour settings page or the tours list shows the URL match explicitly set to '/my/%'.

task_completion.description: Step 1 is created targeting the Timeline block with the correct title.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The steps list for the tour or the step configuration page shows a step titled 'Track Your Deadlines' with the target block set to 'Timeline' (or 'timeline').

task_completion.description: Step 1 contains the correct instructional content.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The step configuration form or a tour preview shows the content text: 'Check here for upcoming assignment due dates.'

task_completion.description: Step 2 is created targeting the Calendar block with the correct title.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The steps list for the tour or the step configuration page shows a step titled 'Important Events' with the target block set to 'Calendar' (or 'calendar_month').

task_completion.description: Step 2 contains the correct instructional content and has the backdrop enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The step configuration form or a tour preview shows the content text: 'View your monthly course schedule here.' AND the 'Show with backdrop' checkbox/setting is enabled.

integrity.description: The agent used the Moodle web interface to create the tour.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Moodle administration web pages being navigated and forms being filled out, rather than terminal commands or database scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Moodle application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows the correct Moodle URL, and the Moodle interface is fully rendered with standard navigation elements.

integrity.description: The agent didn't just open a text editor to display the expected values.
integrity.visual_evidence: The expected titles, contents, and targets are entered into the actual Moodle User Tour configuration forms, not written in a separate text file or terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Tour Name: 'New Student Dashboard Guide'. Expected Path Match: '/my/%'. Step 1 Target: 'timeline' (Timeline block), Step 1 Title: 'Track Your Deadlines'. Step 2 Target: 'calendar_month' (Calendar block), Step 2 Title: 'Important Events'.
